version="26.0.16"> <diagram id="seqlayout" name="Data flow: rating a song -> notifying the sharer"> <mxGraphModel dx="-694" dy="-287" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="100" height="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="route" value="routes/songs.py" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="40" width="100" height="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act3" value="" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" parent="route" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="45" y="90" width="10" height="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act5" value="" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" parent="route" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="45" y="750" width="10" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc" value="notification_service.rate_song" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="40" width="100" height="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act2" value="" <mxCell id="db" value="DB (SQLite)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="40" width="100" height="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act0" value="" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" parent="db" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="45" y="260" width="10" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act1" value="" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" parent="db" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="45" y="430" width="10" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act4" value="" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" parent="db" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="45" y="800" width="10" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nova" value="Nova (sharer)" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;participant=umlActor;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=-14;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1200" y="40" width="100" height="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m0" value="POST /songs/{id}/rate {score: 5}" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0.0957;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="darius" target="act3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" value="rate_song(darius, song, 5)" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.0909;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="act3" target="act2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" value="validate score is 1-5" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.1111;entryX=1;entryY=0.1778;" parent="1" source="act2" target="act2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="730" y="230" /> <mxPoint x="730" y="260" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" value="get Song, get rater; upsert Rating; commit" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.2667;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="act2" target="act0" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" value="rating saved" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=1;entryY=0.3778;" parent="1" source="act0" target="act2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" value="if song.shared_by != darius" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.4889;entryX=1;entryY=0.5556;" parent="1" source="act2" target="act2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="730" y="400" /> <mxPoint x="730" y="430" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" value="create_notification('song_rated'); commit" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.6444;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="act2" target="act1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" value="notification saved" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7556;" parent="1" source="act1" target="act2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note8" value="Notification now stored for Nova" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="980" y="550" width="230" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" value="return rating" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=1;entryY=0.9091;" parent="1" source="act2" target="act3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" value="201 rating.to_dict()" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0.6809;" parent="1" source="act3" target="darius" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note11" value="--- later, Nova opens her notifications ---" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="710" width="230" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m12" value="GET /users/{nova}/notifications" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0.7979;entryX=1;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="nova" target="act5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m13" value="get_notifications(nova)" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.3333;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" parent="1" source="act5" target="act4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m14" value=""darius rated your song 5/5"" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=1;exitY=1.0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0.9043;" parent="1" source="act4" target="nova" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
